---
title: "ComposedDistributions.jl"
description: "A small grammar for composing distributions into larger ones."
categories: [distributions, composition]
---

ComposedDistributions.jl gives a verb grammar — `compose`, `sequential`,
`parallel` — for building larger distributions from smaller ones, along with
helpers for constructing priors. It re-exports ConvolvedDistributions.jl, so
convolution and composition live behind one interface.

## Install

```julia
using Pkg
Pkg.add("ComposedDistributions")
```

## Links

- [Documentation](../docs.html?pkg=ComposedDistributions.jl)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/EpiAware/ComposedDistributions.jl)
